<a id="type-com-digitalasset-canton-lifecycle-flagcloseable"></a>

### `FlagCloseable`

- Introduced: `3.4.10`
- Deprecated: -
- Removed: -

Upstream docs: [Open](https://docs.digitalasset.com/operate/3.4/scaladoc/com/digitalasset/canton/lifecycle/FlagCloseable.html)

**Signature**

```text
trait FlagCloseable extends AutoCloseable with PerformUnlessClosing
```

**Summary**

Adds the java.lang.AutoCloseable.close method to the interface of PerformUnlessClosing. The component's custom shutdown behaviour should override the onClosed method.

- Deprecated: -

<a id="type-com-digitalasset-canton-lifecycle-hassynchronizewithclosing"></a>

### `HasSynchronizeWithClosing`

- Introduced: `3.4.10`
- Deprecated: -
- Removed: -

Upstream docs: [Open](https://docs.digitalasset.com/operate/3.4/scaladoc/com/digitalasset/canton/lifecycle/HasSynchronizeWithClosing.html)

**Signature**

```text
trait HasSynchronizeWithClosing extends HasRunOnClosing
```

**Summary**

Returns whether the component is closing or has already been closed

<a id="type-com-digitalasset-canton-lifecycle-hassynchronizewithreaders"></a>

### `HasSynchronizeWithReaders`

- Introduced: `3.4.10`
- Deprecated: -
- Removed: -

Upstream docs: [Open](https://docs.digitalasset.com/operate/3.4/scaladoc/com/digitalasset/canton/lifecycle/HasSynchronizeWithReaders.html)

**Signature**

```text
trait HasSynchronizeWithReaders extends HasSynchronizeWithClosing
```

**Summary**

Mix-in for keeping track of a set of the readers. Used for implementing the HasSynchronizeWithClosing logic: Each computation acquires one permit before it starts and released it when done. HasSynchronizeWithReaders.synchronizeWithReaders attempts to acquire all permits and logs progress if slow.

<a id="type-com-digitalasset-canton-lifecycle-hasunlessclosing"></a>

### `HasUnlessClosing`

- Introduced: `3.4.10`
- Deprecated: -
- Removed: -

Upstream docs: [Open](https://docs.digitalasset.com/operate/3.4/scaladoc/com/digitalasset/canton/lifecycle/HasUnlessClosing.html)

**Signature**

```text
trait HasUnlessClosing extends AnyRef
```

**Summary**

Runs the computation fa unless isClosing returns true.

<a id="type-com-digitalasset-canton-lifecycle-lifecycle"></a>

### `LifeCycle`

- Introduced: `3.4.10`
- Deprecated: -
- Removed: -

Upstream docs: [Open](https://docs.digitalasset.com/operate/3.4/scaladoc/com/digitalasset/canton/lifecycle/LifeCycle$.html)

**Signature**

```text
object LifeCycle extends NoTracing
```

**Summary**

Utilities for working with instances that support our life cycle pattern.

<a id="type-com-digitalasset-canton-lifecycle-lifecyclemanager"></a>

### `LifeCycleManager`

- Introduced: `3.4.10`
- Deprecated: -
- Removed: -

Upstream docs: [Open](https://docs.digitalasset.com/operate/3.4/scaladoc/com/digitalasset/canton/lifecycle/LifeCycleManager.html)

**Signature**

```text
sealed trait LifeCycleManager extends HasSynchronizeWithClosing
```

**Summary**

Ensures orderly shutdown for a set of LifeCycleManager.ManagedResources and dependent LifeCycleManagers. This creates a shutdown hierarchy.

<a id="type-com-digitalasset-canton-lifecycle-lifecyclescope"></a>

### `LifeCycleScope`

- Introduced: `3.4.10`
- Deprecated: -
- Removed: -

Upstream docs: [Open](https://docs.digitalasset.com/operate/3.4/scaladoc/com/digitalasset/canton/lifecycle/LifeCycleScope.html)

**Signature**

```text
sealed trait LifeCycleScope[Discriminator] extends AnyRef
```

**Summary**

Tracks the LifeCycleManagers that have been accumulated as part of processing the current call. This trait is typically used only in the forms of HasLifeCycleScope.ContextLifeCycleScope and HasLifeCycleScope.OwnLifeCycleScope.

**Members**

No members found for this type in the configured artifacts.

<a id="type-com-digitalasset-canton-lifecycle-performunlessclosing"></a>

### `PerformUnlessClosing`

- Introduced: `3.4.10`
- Deprecated: -
- Removed: -

Upstream docs: [Open](https://docs.digitalasset.com/operate/3.4/scaladoc/com/digitalasset/canton/lifecycle/PerformUnlessClosing.html)

**Signature**

```text
trait PerformUnlessClosing extends OnShutdownRunner with HasSynchronizeWithReaders
```

**Summary**

Provides a way to synchronize closing with other running tasks in the class, such that new tasks aren't scheduled while closing, and such that closing waits for the scheduled tasks.

<a id="type-com-digitalasset-canton-lifecycle-promiseunlessshutdown"></a>

### `PromiseUnlessShutdown`

- Introduced: `3.4.10`
- Deprecated: -
- Removed: -

Upstream docs: [Open](https://docs.digitalasset.com/operate/3.4/scaladoc/com/digitalasset/canton/lifecycle/PromiseUnlessShutdown$.html)

**Signature**

```text
object PromiseUnlessShutdown
```

**Summary**

Creates a supervised promise. Supervision starts when the promises future scala.concurrent.Promise.future is accessed for the first time.

**Members**

| Docs | Member | Introduced | Deprecated | Removed |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |

| [Open](https://docs.digitalasset.com/operate/3.4/scaladoc/com/digitalasset/canton/lifecycle/PromiseUnlessShutdown$.html#supervised[A](description:String,futureSupervisor:com.digitalasset.canton.concurrent.FutureSupervisor,logAfter:scala.concurrent.duration.Duration,logLevel:org.slf4j.event.Level)(implicitecl:com.digitalasset.canton.logging.ErrorLoggingContext):com.digitalasset.canton.lifecycle.PromiseUnlessShutdown[A]) | `supervised(description: String, futureSupervisor: FutureSupervisor, logAfter: Duration, logLevel: Level)(ecl: ErrorLoggingContext): PromiseUnlessShutdown[A]` | `3.4.10` | - | `3.4.11` |

| [Open](https://docs.digitalasset.com/operate/3.4/scaladoc/com/digitalasset/canton/lifecycle/PromiseUnlessShutdown$.html#unsupervised[A]():com.digitalasset.canton.lifecycle.PromiseUnlessShutdown[A]) | `unsupervised(): PromiseUnlessShutdown[A]` | `3.4.10` | - | - |

<a id="type-com-digitalasset-canton-lifecycle-promiseunlessshutdownfactory"></a>

### `PromiseUnlessShutdownFactory`

- Introduced: `3.4.10`
- Deprecated: -
- Removed: -

Upstream docs: [Open](https://docs.digitalasset.com/operate/3.4/scaladoc/com/digitalasset/canton/lifecycle/PromiseUnlessShutdownFactory.html)

**Signature**

```text
trait PromiseUnlessShutdownFactory extends AnyRef
```

**Summary**

Use this method to create a PromiseUnlessShutdown that will automatically be cancelled when the close context is closed. This allows proper clean up of stray promises when the node is transitioning to a passive state.

```text
sealed trait UnlessShutdown[+A] extends Product with Serializable
```

- Deprecated: -

**Signature**

```text
trait UnmanagedLifeCycle extends HasLifeCycleScope
```

**Summary**
